summary: The actual screenshot shows a gameplay map with an AI Visualization window containing AI Status, Visualization Options, and Activity Log sections, closely matching the wireframe's layout but with differences in content, controls, and map elements. The wireframe is partially suitable as it provides a basic structure but uses placeholders and misses detailed section representations.

correctElements.evidence: The window is present in both actual and wireframe with title 'AI Visualization', positioned similarly over the map, satisfying the dockable window description.
Dark starfield background with stellar bodies like Sirius and Canopus, thin green borders, and semi-transparent panels match in both images.
Present in both, with legend items in actual and empty in wireframe, but position and style align.
Displays turn, phase, active player, and resources in similar positions and styles in both.

incorrectElements.expected: Toggles for options like Show Movement Animations, etc., as per description.
incorrectElements.actual: Section present with checkboxes, but wireframe shows placeholder 'bounded scroll content' without specific toggles.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe lacks detailed toggle representations, leading to mismatch in control types and content.

incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe has empty 'Selected' panel, but actual lacks this section entirely.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Missing in actual screenshot, potentially indicating incomplete implementation or wireframe inaccuracy.

incorrectElements.expected: No specific buttons in description, but wireframe shows BACK and NEXT/APPLY.
incorrectElements.actual: Actual has no such buttons; instead has sections without navigation controls.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra controls in wireframe not present in actual, suggesting design evolution or mismatch.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: fixed screen-relative geometry
incorrectElements.expected: Consistent positions for stars like Sirius, Arcturus, Canopus.
incorrectElements.actual: Actual shows Sirius and Canopus, but Arcturus is missing or repositioned; layouts differ slightly.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Differences in map content and positioning, possibly due to dynamic rendering not captured in static wireframe.

incorrectElements.expected: Consistent phase (e.g., Production Phase in wireframe).
incorrectElements.actual: Actual shows 'Purchase Phase', wireframe shows 'Production Phase'.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Text mismatch indicates scenario-specific content not aligned between captures.

incorrectElements.expected: Activity log with content like 'No recent activity'.
incorrectElements.actual: Present in actual, but wireframe lacks this section, using generic placeholder.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe does not represent the activity log, limiting validation accuracy.

incorrectElements.expected: Exact match in dimensions and scaling.
incorrectElements.actual: Both appear at similar resolution, but potential DPI differences or cropping in images provided.
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: As a residual risk, image attachments may not preserve exact pixel-perfect comparison due to compression or rendering artifacts.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe provides a basic layout and style baseline matching global requirements, but uses placeholders instead of detailed sections like AI status, toggles, and activity log, making it insufficient for full validation of the screen description and user-facing behavior.
missingRequirements: Detailed representations of AI status, toggles, selected player, and activity log sections as per screen description.
Dynamic elements like map content and phase-specific text not captured in static wireframe.
recommendedWireframeChanges: Replace placeholders with specific controls and labels for each section (e.g., checkboxes for toggles, log entries).
Include representative data for sections like activity log and selected player.
Ensure consistency in map elements and top bar content to match expected scenarios.
